global_style_rules: Maintain a sophisticated painterly projection-art look
Never become cartoon, cute illustration, mascot art, children-book illustration or photorealistic animal portrait
Style variation must appear through brushwork, pigment behaviour, texture, edge quality, ornament, contrast and color accents
Keep recognisable symbols, but render them as poetic projection artwork
Avoid over-realistic fur, faces, eyes, paws, expressions or animal anatomy
Avoid generic warm orange-blue watercolor sameness
